description: Agent-native CLI + MCP covering all 12 GoDaddy developer APIs (138 endpoints): Domains (incl. DNS records), Certificates, Orders, Subscriptions, Shoppers, ANS/Agents, Parking, Aftermarket, Abuse, Agreements, Countries, and Auctions. Auth via GODADDY_API_KEY/GODADDY_API_SECRET; writes are validated and gated.

novel_features.name: Unified GoDaddy official API command surface
novel_features.description: Combine the GoDaddy Swagger groups into one searchable CLI and MCP catalog covering domains, DNS records, certificates, subscriptions, abuse, shoppers, auctions, and related account APIs.

novel_features.name: Authenticated GoDaddy account route evidence
novel_features.description: Document the official API surface alongside sanitized authenticated account-portal route evidence and live-read proof so agents can reason across docs, portal, and API behavior.

novel_features.name: Approval-gated GoDaddy account mutation controls
novel_features.description: Classify GoDaddy writes by risk, keep dry-run previews available, and require the package write barrier before live DNS, purchase, transfer, cancellation, or account-changing requests.
